# Nyuchi Design Portal

> The canonical design system and component registry for the bundu ecosystem — 294 production-ready UI components, blocks, and charts built on the Five African Minerals design system. Install directly into any project using the shadcn CLI.

**Version:** 4.0.1
**Live:** https://design.nyuchi.com
**API:** https://design.nyuchi.com/api/v1
**MCP Server:** https://design.nyuchi.com/mcp (Streamable HTTP)

## What this site is

The Nyuchi Design Portal is:
1. A **component registry** — 294 items (177 UI, 3 hooks, 9 lib, 105 blocks) installable via `npx shadcn@latest add https://design.nyuchi.com/api/v1/ui/<name>`
2. A **design system reference** — Five African Minerals palette, typography, spacing, and radius tokens
3. A **brand documentation hub** — canonical brand specs for bundu, nyuchi, mukoko, shamwari, nhimbe
4. An **architecture documentation hub** — local-first data strategy, sovereignty assessments, open data pipeline
5. An **MCP server** — AI assistants can connect at `https://design.nyuchi.com/mcp` to access all registry data, design tokens, and architecture docs

## Key pages

- [API Documentation](/api-docs): Full OpenAPI 3.1 spec for all endpoints
- [Component Registry](/registry): How to consume and contribute to the registry
- [Brand System](/brand): Five African Minerals palette and brand guidelines
- [Colors](/brand/colors): Complete color token reference
- [Architecture](/architecture): Ecosystem architecture overview
- [Data Layer](/architecture/data-layer): Local-first data strategy (RxDB, SQLite, PouchDB, CouchDB)
- [Pipeline](/architecture/pipeline): Open data pipeline (Redpanda → Flink → Doris)
- [Sovereignty](/architecture/sovereignty): Technology sovereignty assessments

## API endpoints (machine-readable)

All endpoints return JSON with schema.org JSON-LD metadata and CORS headers.

- `GET /api/v1` — Discovery document
- `GET /api/v1/brand` — Brand system (minerals, typography, spacing, ecosystem)
- `GET /api/v1/ui` — Component registry index (294 items)
- `GET /api/v1/ui/{name}` — Individual component with inline source code
- `GET /api/v1/ecosystem` — Architecture principles
- `GET /api/v1/data-layer` — Data layer specification
- `GET /api/v1/pipeline` — Open data pipeline
- `GET /api/v1/sovereignty` — Sovereignty assessments
- `GET /api/v1/health` — Health check
- `GET /api/openapi` — OpenAPI 3.1 specification (YAML)

## MCP server for AI assistants

Connect at `https://design.nyuchi.com/mcp` (POST, Streamable HTTP transport).

**Tools:** list_components, get_component, get_component_docs, search_components, get_design_tokens, scaffold_component, get_install_command, get_brand_info, get_architecture_info, get_database_status

**Resources:** mukoko://registry, mukoko://brand, mukoko://design-tokens, mukoko://architecture

## Design system quick reference

**Five African Minerals:**
- Cobalt `#0047AB` — primary blue, links, CTAs
- Tanzanite `#B388FF` — purple accent, mukoko brand
- Malachite `#64FFDA` — success states, nhimbe brand
- Gold `#FFD740` — rewards, highlights, nyuchi brand
- Terracotta `#D4A574` — community, warmth, bundu brand

**Typography:** Noto Sans (body), Noto Serif (display), JetBrains Mono (code)

**Install any component:**
```
npx shadcn@latest add https://design.nyuchi.com/api/v1/ui/button
```

## Ecosystem brands

| Brand | Meaning | Role |
|-------|---------|------|
| bundu | Wilderness (Shona) | The complete bundu ecosystem |
| nyuchi | Bee (Shona) | Infrastructure & enterprise products |
| mukoko | Beehive (Shona) | Africa's consumer super app |
| shamwari | Friend (Shona) | Sovereign AI companion |
| nhimbe | Gathering (Shona) | Events & community gatherings |
